title: 小两口旅行记
description: 小两口在欧洲旅行看展把旅途里的开心好奇和小疲惫都变成表情

notes: The user-provided image is the source of truth for the two-character identity.
The source image has a baked white background and is reference material only, not a final transparent WeChat upload asset.
Source/reference intake writes only to source/references and master/input.
Do not generate final sticker sheets or the final 18 independent sticker images until the master character card and master image are approved.

theme.summary: young married couple traveling in Europe and visiting museums together
avoid: romance overpowering the travel and museum theme
text-only identity descriptions without image linkage

masterCharacter.shortPersonality: warm, affectionate, travel-loving, curious, playful, supportive
lockedTraits: two-person young anime/chibi married couple identity
girl with long dark-brown hair, side bangs, large glossy brown eyes, soft blush, warm smile, navy outer layer, and light inner top
boy with short black hair, large glossy brown eyes, black rectangular glasses, gray hoodie, teal shirt, warm skin tone, and calm friendly smile
warm soft rendering with simple clothing shapes
close side-by-side married couple relationship impression
travel and museum theme must remain visible across the pack
allowedVariations: facial expression within the same two-character identity
most stickers should show both characters together
a small number of single-character close-ups only if the selected character remains traceable to the approved master image and the pack still reads as a two-person couple travel pack
small travel and museum props such as phone, camera, museum ticket, generic map, guidebook, coffee cup, suitcase, train ticket, umbrella, postcard, or message bubble

generic European museum and travel scene cues such as exhibition hall shapes, sculpture silhouettes, framed art shapes, street cafe hints, station signs without real brand text, or cobblestone street mood
simple scene cues related to greeting, taking photos, entering a museum, looking at exhibitions, walking, resting, waiting, getting lost, enjoying coffee, buying souvenirs, or saying goodbye
caption-specific sparkles, hearts, sweat drops, motion marks, or small stars when kept inside the safe area
forbiddenVariations: changing either character into an animal, mascot object, robot, or unrelated person
changing the girl hair length, dark-brown hair identity, face shape, large brown eyes, blush style, or navy-light outfit impression without approval
changing the boy short black hair, black glasses, face shape, large brown eyes, gray hoodie, or teal shirt impression without approval
adding extra people or unrelated characters
dropping the two-person couple identity from most stickers
turning the pack into a celebrity, fan-art, or recognizable third-party IP set
adding unapproved logos, trademarks, copyrighted IP, recognizable museum logos, exact artwork reproductions, brand names, or personally sensitive content
making specific real landmarks or artworks so recognizable that they create review or rights risk
letting image generation invent, rewrite, or misspell production captions
placing final sticker, cover, or icon content on a baked white, checkerboard, or square background

identityPreservation.rule: Every master-derivative generation step must supply the approved reference image as an actual image input and must preserve the two-character married-couple identity before style cleanup, museum/travel scene additions, or pose changes.

introduction.value: 小两口在欧洲旅行看展把旅途里的开心好奇和小疲惫都变成表情

style.placement: near lower part of each sticker without blocking eyes, mouth, hands, or main expression

items.scenario: starting the trip or heading out for a museum day
items.pose: both characters stand together with small suitcase and camera, excited travel sparkle

items.scenario: going to a museum or exhibition
items.pose: both characters hold generic museum tickets and walk toward a simple exhibition-hall cue

items.scenario: taking a travel photo or museum selfie
items.pose: girl raises a phone for a selfie while boy leans in, both faces clearly visible

items.scenario: reacting to a beautiful exhibition, street view, or museum space
items.pose: both characters look up with sparkling eyes at a generic framed-art or sculpture silhouette

items.scenario: lightly joking while viewing abstract art or unfamiliar museum notes
items.pose: both characters tilt heads with confused cute faces in front of a generic abstract frame

items.scenario: being strongly impressed by an exhibition, museum space, or travel view
items.pose: both characters open eyes wide with awe, small sparkle and generic sculpture silhouette

items.scenario: checking the route in a city, museum, or train station
items.pose: both characters hold a generic map together with small question marks

items.scenario: taking a cafe break during the trip
items.pose: both characters sit or stand with small coffee cups and relaxed smiles

items.scenario: getting tired after walking through museums or city streets
items.pose: both characters slump cutely beside a suitcase or bench, tired but cheerful

items.scenario: choosing a souvenir or museum shop item
items.pose: girl points to a small souvenir while boy looks amused, no real brand or artwork

items.scenario: confirming a plan, ticket, itinerary, restaurant, route, or next stop has been arranged
items.pose: boy carefully holds generic tickets while girl nods, small checkmark cue

items.scenario: walking together through a city or museum
items.pose: both characters walk side by side with subtle hand-holding or close shoulder-to-shoulder pose

items.scenario: joking that they got lost while traveling, navigating a museum, or finding a route
items.pose: both characters look at a map with cute sweat drops and turned-around arrows

items.scenario: asking someone to take a photo during travel or in front of an exhibition
items.pose: one character adjusts camera or bag while the other waits with a patient smile

items.scenario: small sweet moment during the trip, secondary romance tone
items.pose: both characters lean close with gentle blush and tiny hearts, travel cue still present

items.scenario: packing souvenirs or postcards after a visit
items.pose: both characters hold a small postcard or souvenir bag with generic non-branded design
both characters sleepy beside a suitcase and small moon, still clearly the same couple

items.scenario: moving on to the next stop or saying goodbye after a museum visit
items.pose: both characters wave together with train-ticket or route-card cue, no real station brand
